CustomField.description: 1- After saving the new request, Go to " Related " then select in " Case Product " the Carmignac products you want to related to this request //2- Open the contact details and verify that the field Data Solution Email is completed accordingly
CustomField.inlineHelpText: 1- After saving the new request, Go to " Related " then select in " Case Product " the Carmignac products you want to related to this request //2- Open the contact details and verify that the field Data Solution Email is completed accordingly
CustomField.label: Please add Fund, Share Class & DS Email
